author: Alexandre Stanislawski
subject: v1.11.12
body: ## [1.11.12](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.11.11...v1.11.12) (2017-05-30) ### Bug Fixes * **sffv:** when using a large limit, retain the search (#2163) ([3d95d4c](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/3d95d4c)), closes [#2156](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2156)
